title: Dumb Ideas
description: This mod adds a Store, cases form cs and other cool stuff
body:
This mod is a collection of Dumb Ideas from my Friends:



Idea 1:

- adds a Kfc with chickenwings and also a basketball place with basketball players wich can drop thier basketball wich is a very strong weapon that you can throw

Idea 2:

- adds new tnts to minecraft like the 5x tnt wich is stronger then the regular tnt, also adds a grenate wich can be thrown and explodes on impact

Idea 3:

- Every tool in your inventory will be damaged over time and can only gain the durability back if you use the tool. But still mending works.



Many new Ideas will follow soon in a future update and if you have any pls leave a comment
